problem.title: LIO-SAM on the public HDL-400 reference window
problem.question: How does LIO-SAM perform on the public HDL-400 reference window?

dataset.reference_role: public reference trajectory converted from pose_trace.csv

variants.label: Default (no IMU)
variants.intent: LiDAR-only mode; no IMU data available in KITTI Raw fixtures.
variants.note: Tightly-coupled LiDAR-inertial odometry with factor graph and loop closure (no GT seed; anchor matches first GT pose).
variants.readability_note: Uses the default CLI surface only.
variants.extensibility_note: No extra profile knobs beyond the stable core contract.
variants.decision_reason: Useful for comparison, but not strong enough to replace the current default.

variants.label: Fast
variants.intent: Reduce input density and keyframe rate while disabling loop closure; remains LiDAR-only when imu.csv is absent.
variants.note: Tightly-coupled LiDAR-inertial odometry with factor graph and loop closure (no GT seed; anchor matches first GT pose).
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Best combined benchmark score on the shared dataset and interface.

variants.label: Dense
variants.intent: Increase input density while keeping the full keyframe cadence and loop closure enabled; remains LiDAR-only when imu.csv is absent.
variants.note: Tightly-coupled LiDAR-inertial odometry with factor graph and loop closure (no GT seed; anchor matches first GT pose).
variants.readability_note: Adds only boolean toggles on top of the stable CLI.
variants.extensibility_note: Still stays inside the stable CLI, but expands the toggle surface.
variants.decision_reason: Useful for comparison, but not strong enough to replace the current default.
